title: Process for introducing ‘not for EU’ labelling for goods sold in Great Britain
body: "The Marking of Retail Goods Regulations 2025 confer a power on the Secretary of State to issue a notice. This will require operators to individually mark specified products as ‘not for EU’ before they can be sold to consumers in Great Britain.  This policy paper explains the decision-making process that should be undertaken by the Secretary of State. "
